---
title: "Scaling Narrative Fiscal Shock Identification with LLMs"
date: last-modified
date-format: long
abstract: Abstract goes here.
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    comments:
      hypothesis: true
  docx: default
  jats: default
  academic-typst: default
section-numbering: "1.1.1"
---

Article text goes here.
